review_title: Good for what it is by to expensive too
description: Remedyforce can be expensive, and the initial setup and configuration process can be complex.
author: Nicole W.
pros: It's fairly Easy to use and navigate and it has a comprehensive set of features for IT service management that meets ITIL standards.
cons: It can be expensive if you are using it for a small to medium size business and the capabilities are not as robust as they could be for the price.

description: Use it for automating approvals in our change and incident management, and use it for documenting changes.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It has features that are intuitive for our change and incident management workflows and approval flows.
cons: It has an outdated user interface, which makes it less appealing to work with.

description: Was glad we switched and so were most of the co-workers I talked to.
author: Chris O.
pros: It provided reporting on the most important things.
cons: Overall usability was lacking. The system seemed too convoluted and was not intuitive. Reporting seemed to be limited as far as capabilities.

description: We migrated from Microsoft Service Manager to Remedyforce. Some of the historical data from SM was imported into Remedyforce, and for the most part is working well.
author: mike M.
pros: We primarily use this product as our ticketing system. As an MSP, we support multiple companies, and users are able to open their own tickets either via email or entering them in the portal.
cons: Tickets with multiple Tasks do not have the ability to enter time worked on the individual task, only the main ticket.

description: Remedy is a flexible system to use for ITSM.
author: peter A.
pros: The ticket management feature of Remedy is ease to use even as a novice. It is ease to filter for all Service request relating to your department and you can actually spool a report to support your audit. I like the fact that SLAs can be monitored to assist resolvers prioritize which request to resolve first.
cons: I don't like the fact that I will have to request the admin to share a report of all my resolved tickets, I should be able to do that myself.
author_profession: IT Asset & Configuration Analyst, Service Catalog and Knowledgebase Manager

description: excellent experience in terms of using remedyforce
author: Manish R.
pros: Ease of use, ticketing, logging, alerts, breach sla etc.
cons: nothing as such since the software meets all the business requirements properly

author: Gerardo R.
pros: It is really easy to use and the support team is very competent
cons: Sometimes the responses from support it can take up to 3 days

author: Pauline M.
pros: Remedyforce brings the processes of ITSM to the force.com platform. With all of the data on a single platform, you can eliminate the black hole that typically exists between your Customer facing service/support teams and your dev Ops/IT teams. Easy to implement and very flexible, and simple to roll-out because for teams already using Salesforce, there is no new interface to learn, it is simply a new tab on their desktop. Remedyforce has all of the components of a strong ITSM tool - Incident mgt, Service Requests, Change Mgt, Problem mgt, CMDB, workflows, etc. Since it is built on the force.com platform, your developers and administrators can support both systems, no need to bring in another skill set which simplifies your support and ongoing development of the tool. BMC is a great partner who has been in this space for years. They are not just a vendor, but work with you as a partner to share their insights, with continuous enhancements via the Saas platform. If you have an IT challenge, they can leverage their vast knowledge of this space to get you an answer.
cons: There are some products on the market that have a few more whistles and bells, including some of the other premise based BMC products.

author: Nikhil M.
pros: It is based on the very widely used BMC ITIL practices. It makes us of Salesforce technologies which lets you distribut this product very easily and connect with your existing customer base.
cons: This product has served all the functions very well. nothing comes to my mind as i don't like about the product.

description: We use Remedy for our ticketing system in my IT department. This is the one system I am in and out of all day. There have been upgrade periods that have been a bit painful to get through but other than that the product is great for what it is intended to do. It is easy to navigate and has a lot of features that I do not necessarily use often but enjoy having the options. I have noticed that there are several ways to do the same thing, which is nice but could be confusing to an end-user who is not tech-friendly. Overall I like Remedy and would recommend it to others as an effective product for a ticketing system.
author: Kellee T.
pros: Easy to use, lots of features
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: BMC Remedyforce - une solution d'IT Management qui a du muscle
description: Notre organisation fournit des services de help desk applicatif à un ensemble de sociétés, regroupées dans une Fédération. Pour tenir nos engagement de qualité de service, nous devions professionnaliser notre approche de gestion des incidents pour gagner en efficacité.
author: Henri A.
pros: Facilité de mise ne œuvre dans notre environnement Salesforce cloud. Solution complète qui couvre tous les processus ITIL avec des fonctions accessibles en libre-service.
cons: Un prix à priori un peu élevé qui croit rapidement avec la volumétrie.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Benoit T.
pros: Parfait pour coordonner entre équipes, le flux d'approbation est très bien
cons: l'outil de recherche est très minimale.

author: shannon R.
pros: I would recommend this product. We have had no issues with it and it is a great way to track requests and processes.
cons: That I do not have an understanding of it's full scope. I use it on a very limited basis and feel like it could be incorporated more.

description: We've been using Remedyforce for two years now. Our Customers and Techs keep find easy to use, ease to access and it has become a product they all depend on. Our initial set-up from software download to Production rollout was less then 90 days ! We are still finding innovative ways to use Remedyforce for our Customers needs. Remedyforce has proven to be a very successful and dependable tool !
author: Rick G.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jose María B.
pros: Easy to customized and fast to work with software. Salesforce gives you all security and support you need on a cloud base solution. Remedyforce is fully alligned with ITIL processes and could be implemmented just following the easy templates included in the solution.
cons: I miss the chance to create new proyects within the product. Remedyforce is not yet certified by Pink Elephant in any ITIL processes even thought you can implement them, and It would be great if we could get this SW on premises as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
